description: Core MVP for KithNode: alumni signal discovery, lead scoring, outreach pipeline with AutoGuard kill-switch.

userStories.title: Initialize project with TypeScript, Next.js, and Tailwind
userStories.description: Set up Next.js 14+ App Router, TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS, ESLint. Include a health-check API route at /api/health and a minimal landing page.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run dev starts without errors

userStories.title: Set up database schema for users and alumni contacts
userStories.description: Create Prisma schema with User, AlumniContact, and Connection models.
acceptanceCriteria: Prisma schema with User, AlumniContact, Connection models
User: id, email, name, university, targetIndustry, createdAt
AlumniContact: id, name, firmName, title, linkedInUrl, university, graduationYear
Connection: id, userId, alumniId, strengthScore (float), status (enum: NEW/CONTACTED/RESPONDED/CONVERTED)
Seed script creates 5 test users and 20 test alumni

userStories.title: Build authentication with NextAuth
userStories.description: Implement NextAuth.js with Google OAuth. Protect dashboard routes.
acceptanceCriteria: User record created in DB on first sign-in

userStories.title: Create the alumni contact list view
userStories.description: Build /dashboard/contacts page with sortable table of alumni contacts.
acceptanceCriteria: Table with columns: Name, Firm, Title, University, Strength Score, Status
Sortable by strength score (default: highest first)
Search bar filters by name or firm

userStories.title: Implement basic lead scoring algorithm
userStories.description: Server-side function computing Connection Strength (0-100). Factors: shared university (+20), shared graduation decade (+10), same industry (+15), firm prestige tier (+10-25), mutual connections (+5 each, max 20).

userStories.title: Build the outreach draft composer
userStories.description: Slide-over panel that generates personalized outreach email draft with authenticity emphasis.
acceptanceCriteria: AI generates personalized draft from shared context
Active voice, no generic AI patterns
Open in Email button creates mailto: link

userStories.title: Implement the AutoGuard kill-switch
userStories.description: Detect when alumni responds, halt automations, notify user, log audit event.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log entry with timestamp, contactId, userId, action
No further auto-messages without explicit user action
Unit test: status change triggers kill-switch
Unit test: manual override re-enables automation

userStories.title: Add PostHog analytics integration
userStories.description: Track key events: sign-up, contact-viewed, outreach-drafted, outreach-sent, autoguard-triggered.
acceptanceCriteria: Events: user_signed_up, contact_viewed, outreach_drafted, outreach_sent, autoguard_triggered
